ShardEqualizer 1.0.0-beta.7
Copyright (C) 2026 Anatoliy Koperin <a.koperin@gmail.com>

  balancer         Show shard balancer state and current shard distribution.

  config-init      Create new configuration.

  config-update    Scan new sharded collections and create default
                   configuration.

  deviation        Calculate collection size deviation.

  equalize         Align shard sizes by changing zone ranges

  merge            Merge empty or small chunks.

  presplit         Split and distribute existing chunks among zones.

  scan-jumbo       Scan jumbo chunks.

  help             Display more information on a specific command.

  version          Display version information.

commands.payload:
ShardEqualizer 1.0.0-beta.7
Copyright (C) 2026 Anatoliy Koperin <a.koperin@gmail.com>

  balancer         Show shard balancer state and current shard distribution.

  config-init      Create new configuration.

  config-update    Scan new sharded collections and create default
                   configuration.

  deviation        Calculate collection size deviation.

  equalize         Align shard sizes by changing zone ranges

  merge            Merge empty or small chunks.

  presplit         Split and distribute existing chunks among zones.

  scan-jumbo       Scan jumbo chunks.

  help             Display more information on a specific command.

  version          Display version information.

  -h, --hosts       Required. Required. The host name (and optional port number)
                    where the mongos of the sharded cluster is running. You can
                    specify multiple hosts separated by commas.

  -u, --user        User name with which to authenticate to the mongos.

  -p, --password    Password with which to authenticate to the mongos.

  --script-file     (Default: commandPlan_{currentDateTime}.js) Command plan
                    file.

  --store-mode      Operation modes of the intermediate file storage [c - clean,
                    r - read, w - write].

  --version         Display version information.
